seo.title: EREA Logistics Services | Supply Chain Transformation
seo.description: EREA Logistics Services transforms supply chains into measurable competitive advantages across Latin America.

hero.title: We Turn Supply Chains into Measurable Competitive Advantages
hero.subtitle: We design and implement solutions that reduce structural costs, release working capital, and elevate service levels—integrating strategy, technology, and advanced analytics.

about.label: ABOUT
about.title: A specialized practice in Supply Chain Transformation
paragraphs: Erea Logistics Services is EREA Consulting Group’s specialized practice for supply chain transformation.
We combine executive experience, proprietary methodologies, and the support of EREA Decisions Lab to make logistics a strategic business enabler.
From diagnosis through implementation, we lead structural redesigns that strengthen profitability, improve operational efficiency, and prepare organizations to scale with discipline and control.
about.closing: We don’t stop at diagnosis. We design, implement, and ensure results.

value.label: VALUE PROPOSITION
value.title: Supply chain is the financial enabler of growth
value.description: A well-designed supply chain reduces structural costs, releases working capital, increases availability, and enables scalable execution with technology and control.

items.title: Lower costs, higher efficiency
items.text: Structural logistics cost reduction and productivity gains.

items.title: Working capital optimized
items.text: Less trapped inventory, higher turns and coverage control.

items.title: Data-driven decisions
items.text: Advanced analytics for precision, visibility, and disciplined execution.

items.title: Technology with real impact
items.text: WMS, TMS, IBP, OMS, Demand Planning and automation implemented with value focus.

transformation.label: TRANSFORMATION
transformation.title: Our 5 transformation fronts
transformation.description: We intervene end-to-end—strategy, processes, technology and implementation—focused on financial impact and operational sustainability.

items.title: Supply Chain Strategy & Governance
items.text: We design planning, procurement and S&OP models that align supply and demand with executive discipline and financial clarity.
items.impact: Impact: decision control, reduced variability, consistent execution.

items.title: Distribution Centers & Automation
items.text: We design and optimize DCs focused on productivity, storage density and scalability, evaluating mechanization and automation.
items.impact: Impact: higher throughput, lower cost per line, growth-ready capacity.

items.title: Strategic Inventory Management
items.text: Advanced replenishment and segmentation models that reduce excess, minimize stockouts and improve inventory profitability.
items.impact: Impact: lower DOH, higher availability, improved cash flow.

items.title: Digitalization & Systems
items.text: We select and implement WMS, TMS and IBP ensuring technology mirrors operations and delivers measurable value.
items.impact: Impact: visibility, control, less rework and better execution.

items.title: Transportation & Last Mile
items.text: We redesign networks, configure fleets and apply routing/monitoring tools to reduce cost and improve compliance.
items.impact: Impact: lower cost per delivery/km, stronger OTIF and stability.

items.title: Transformation Methodology
items.text: Diagnosis → Design → Implementation → Operational support. A structured process that ensures results and sustainability.
items.impact: Impact: clear roadmap, quick wins and structural projects aligned to business.

impact.label: RESULTS
impact.title: Quantified impact
impact.description: We convert cost structures into sustainable competitive advantages through technical rigor and execution.

items.text: Incremental value captured in logistics fee
Coverage reduction in critical category
Structural logistics cost reduction
Fill Rate achieved
Distribution centers designed
Automated positions implemented

questions.label: EXECUTIVE CHECK
questions.title: Is your supply chain limiting your business growth?
questions.description: If you answer yes to several of these, your operating model may be impacting profitability.
items: Does your inventory consistently exceed target coverage?
Do you face stockouts in strategic items while carrying excess elsewhere?
Is your logistics cost above industry benchmarks?
Are you unable to quantify true cost-to-serve by supplier or channel?
Are purchasing decisions disconnected from a formal S&OP process?
Do your systems rely heavily on Excel or lack proper integration?
Does transportation represent more than 50% of total logistics spend?
Is your distribution center operating at capacity limits?
Does sales growth fail to translate proportionally into EBITDA growth?
questions.closing: A poorly designed supply chain doesn’t just create hidden costs. It caps strategic growth.

cases.label: EXPERIENCE
cases.title: Impact cases
cases.description: Examples of outcomes achieved through technical interventions, data-driven decisions and disciplined execution.

items.title: End-to-end retail transformation
items.text: Network redesign, technology implementation and operational optimization to reduce structural costs and improve service levels.

items.title: Critical category inventory optimization
items.text: Category-and-supplier intervention to release working capital and improve availability.

items.title: Technical logistics-fee negotiation
items.text: Bottom-up costing and replicable fee design to monetize efficiency and improve service sustainably.

items.title: Automated DC design
items.text: High-density, high-speed solutions to support competitive leadership and long-term growth.

team.label: TEAM
team.title: Executive experience, institutional approach
paragraphs: A senior team with international experience and 25+ years leading transformations across Latin America.
Our partners combine strategic vision, technical depth and execution capability across retail, supermarkets, industry, logistics operators and manufacturing.
We integrate executive expertise with advanced analytics to ensure data-driven decisions and measurable results.
team.panelText: We integrate data, technology and operational tactics to turn supply chain into an efficiency and competitiveness engine.

items.title: Technical diagnosis
items.text: Detailed analysis of the current supply chain, identifying inefficiencies and improvement opportunities through data and metrics.

items.title: Optimized operating design
items.text: Custom operating model that optimizes processes, resources and technology to maximize efficiency.

items.title: Implementation & leadership
items.text: Guided execution with on-site leadership, ensuring adoption and minimizing disruptions.

items.title: Culture & discipline support
items.text: Post-implementation support to foster a culture of continuous improvement and operational discipline.
